title: Storage Proofs Done Wrong: a Case Study
description:
A critical vulnerability was discovered in an open-source library for MPT proof verification, which was used by a few large protocols to operate on L2s. 
Millions of user funds were at risk, but it was patched before it could be exploited.

Speaker: Elia Anzuoni, Smart Contract Auditor, ChainSecurity.

Presentation Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1uYx5HyYJhFpk0NMPBqaWw23Ooux1ZCo_buEGBSE8mp8/edit?slide=id.p#slide=id.p

About DSS
DSS brings together top minds in blockchain, auditing, and security — from white-hat hackers and protocol developers to academic researchers and industry leaders. The goal? To tackle the most pressing issues in DeFi security head-on — from smart contract exploits and cross-chain vulnerabilities to governance threats and beyond.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/schedule
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Auditorium Stage - Day 2
